taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Backend Software Engineer
core_skills: Software Development, Python, Java, Go, Software Development Life Cycle
skill_match_scores: Software Development:1.0, Python:1.0, Java:1.0, Go:1.0, Software Development Life Cycle:1.0
must_have_quals: Experience in software development (Python, Java, Go, or similar) with a strong grasp of the full SDLC, 5+ years of proven experience with Grafana Cloud and Splunk Cloud, Comfortable managing Grafana Cloud and Splunk Cloud via code (Terraform providers or dedicated CLI tools) rather than just manual UI configuration, Practical experience with cloud-based tools and internet-related infrastructure
preferred_quals: Experience configuring xMatters for intelligent automated alerting and on-call workflows, Experience with Axonius for cybersecurity asset management and identifying coverage gaps in security tooling, Strong understanding of CI/CD pipelines and the ability to integrate observability metrics into deployment gates
core_responsibilities: Utilize Grafana Cloud and Splunk Cloud to build deep visibility into system health, Manage these platforms using Configuration-as-Code (e.g., Terraform, Grafana Grizzly, or Splunk Monitoring-as-Code) to ensure environment parity and version-controlled dashboards, Integrate xMatters for automated incident routing and communication, Utilize Axonius to maintain a comprehensive, real-time inventory of cyber assets and ensure security compliance across the tech stack, Create and maintain high-fidelity technical documentation and runbooks to empower future engineers and managers to resolve issues independently
job_summary: WEX is a company specializing in modern, cloud-native environments, and they are seeking a Software Development Engineer 3. This role focuses on architecting the 'Observability-as-Code' strategy, ensuring that monitoring and asset management are integrated into the development process.
